title: Roverine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Roverines''' were a kind of predatory insect native to [[Davirien]] jungles.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> They annually traveled in swarms of hundreds of thousands, even millions eating everything in their path, plants and animals alike.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
